_provenance: PA-18: Schema-derived. Column set and constraints authored from plan.md §Deliverables (016-spec-bundles/plan.md) and cross-checked against the binding constraint in docs/handoff/council-converged-migration-plan.md §3.1. The freeze_discipline enum (THEORY/MANDATE/STYLIZED_FACT/CALIBRATION/BACKTEST_SELECTION) is sourced verbatim from README.md §1 hazard NN1 and plan.md §Deliverables. No producer-computed values are captured; all assertions are shape/presence/constraint checks.
description: Expected schema shape for spec_bundles and spec_facets tables after migration 016_spec_bundles.sql is applied. Used by the fixture-refresh schema-validator test.

spec_bundles.freeze_discipline_note: Not stored on spec_bundles itself — lives on spec_facets rows.

spec_facets.freeze_discipline_note: BACKTEST_SELECTION is the NN1-violating value; its presence in spec_facets increments S in BHY N_effective = N_optuna + S. Test suite pins the accepted enum and verifies the field is enforced at application level (not SQL CHECK — consistent with the codebase's app-level immutability pattern from llm_suggestions).

seed_bundle._note: Minimal seed row for fixture DB. bundle_hash is a deterministic hex string; test code must NOT assert its exact value (it is producer-computed). Tests assert it is a non-empty string.

seed_facet._note: Minimal seed facet row for fixture DB. facet_value is JSON-serialised (string). Tests assert shape/presence, not value.
